raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I ordered a XXXX classic series 4.5 quart tilt head stand mixer through the official XXXX website purchased with my Citi bank credit card. 
The order number was XXXX for {$300.00} They also provided a tracking number. It was delivered to my house on Thursday, XX/XX/XXXX. 

I used it once and decided I no longer wanted it. It was too heavy and complicated to use in my opinion. So I contacted XXXX for a refund and they approved the return request. XXXX approves or denies the return request before creating a shipping label for refund etc. so that was a process in itself. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I received a digital shipping label to print out. 

After close to a month of not getting anything back from XXXX, I reached out to them XX/XX/XXXX. The reply was automated and they mentioned i would hear back from them in a day. on the XXXX, I received an email back. XXXX doesnt have an easily accessible contact email on their website because the reply was from parts and service department. Frustrated, I contacted Citi bank the same day ( XX/XX/XXXX ) because XXXX is a nightmare to be able to speak to anyone, the wait time on the phone is over XXXX hours and their live chat agents are nowhere to be found. It seems like its all automated. I wanted to dispute the transaction because I had not heard back from XXXX and had already sent out the package to return. I was told Citi bank credit cards have buyer protection. 

Citi updated me on XX/XX/XXXX saying they have not yet heard from XXXX but will keep me informed on my dispute etc. XX/XX/XXXX I got another reminder that they were working on this. XX/XX/XXXX another update saying they havent heard from XXXX. XX/XX/XXXX, they finally got a hold of XXXX and on the XXXX, theye sent another letter saying that I am still in possession of the item and I am responsible for the purchase amount. 

I mailed this item out months ago and it was an approved return through XXXX customer service. They emailed me the shipping label, I went months without hearing back from them and now theyre saying I still have the item. This is humiliating and beyond frustrating. I should not have to pay on an item I already returned.
